# A309370 a(20) >= 1989: Sidon set in {0,1}^20, integer componentwise addition.
# 1989 vectors, one per line (bit position 0 first). no value recorded on OEIS for this n.
# Independently re-verified: all C(1989,2)+1989 pairwise sums distinct.
